title: lastrea glabella
intro: Lastrea glabella, also known as the glabella fern, is a species of fern found in tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The glabella fern has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Lastrea glabella typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams for its medicinal and health benefits.
